response.justification: Bogdan possesses an excellent technical background with extensive experience in modern software development, open-source projects, and system architecture. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirements for this executive-level role. Most notably, his basic German skills do not meet the strict C1 requirement necessary for client advisory. Furthermore, his background is strictly in technical execution and technical leadership (Staff Engineer), lacking the required operational team management, executive-level consulting, and commercial project oversight expected of a Head of Development.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with modern software architecture, open-source technologies, and Linux environments.
Proven track record of technical initiative, including founding an open-source platform (GISCollective) and operating at a Staff Engineer level.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, mentoring through coding dojos, and sharing knowledge via technical workshops.
concerns: Basic German language proficiency fails to meet the strict C1 requirement for client-facing communication and advisory.
Lacks explicit executive-level team management, operational leadership, and commercial project management experience.
Missing documented experience in formal UML modeling, enterprise risk management, and IT security compliance.
